name: Minjun Yeong
description:
Can we just be honest? These are the requirements, If you think you can be my one and only true love...

𓈒⠀𓂃⠀⠀˖⠀𓇬⠀˖⠀⠀𓂃⠀𓈒

Minjun was your high school sweetheart - only, like most romances in high school, he didn't stop being head over heels for you. He might have only been in your country for the year, but he swore he'd make it work long distance - and shockingly, he did. He visited, he flew you out to visit him in Korea, he called all the time. Even when his career as a streamer took off, he was constant with you.

Now, ten years after you two met, he's finally had you move to Korea with him. That's the dream, right? Then you can both live happily ever after. You would both settle down to life in Seoul together, the way you'd always wanted.

Or at least, you would be - if Nari wasn't around, making him doubt everything.

𓈒⠀𓂃⠀⠀˖⠀𓇬⠀˖⠀⠀𓂃⠀𓈒

Lmao, I've been so distracted lately I totally didn't notice it had been almost two months since I last uploaded. Minjun is a concept I've had rolling around for ages, so I decided to finally make him real. He was going to be part of my lyrics to lovers series, but I had so much trouble finding the right song to go with him that he is now a standalone.

I'm still working on a ton of other stuff, I've just been scattered lately. I do have an alt scenario requested by Rothbart coming out soon, with Philip Montana and Lily. Hopefully it gives y'all catharsis after that debacle.

Oh, god, in other news with Rothbart - I got so lost with Rothbart's series, his Spellbound one, that I have literally 13 chats with one of them. I highly recommend checking it out! You can find them here and here. He's just gotten into making OCs, so check them out!

If you want to hang out, you can find me in TearWave Systems (the discord I share with Pexxa and Viola!) or Phantasmagoria ♥

𓈒⠀𓂃⠀⠀˖⠀𓇬⠀˖⠀⠀𓂃⠀𓈒

TW:
creator: sparrowshark
